description_long: This is a rectangular wooden toolbox with a robust, rustic appearance, reinforced by two metal bands running lengthwise across the top and sides. The wood is dark brown, weathered, and textured, suggesting durability and frequent use. The ends of the box feature carved-out handholds for easy lifting, and the lid is flush with the body, indicating a simple, functional design. The metal bands are slightly corroded, adding to the aged, utilitarian look. There are no visible hinges, latches, or external markings, giving the box a minimalist, practical aesthetic. The overall construction suggests it is designed to store and transport tools securely in urban or workshop environments.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden toolbox reinforced with metal bands and carved handholds, featuring a weathered, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat wooden lid with two metal bands and no visible handles or latches.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carved handhold and the thickness of the wooden panels.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the wooden lid and metal bands without additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the carved handhold and the robust wooden construction.
attribute_handle_type: Carved wooden handholds on each short end, fixed and integrated into the box structure, rectangular in shape with a slight curve for grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: None visible; the lid appears to rest flush without an external latch or locking mechanism.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied by the box shape; no visible trays, dividers, or external drawers.
